mapper.select: SELECT a.attachment_id, a.business_type, a.business_id, a.file_id, f.file_name, f.file_size, f.file_key, a.file_category, a.version_no, a.is_main AS main_flag, f.create_time AS upload_time, f.creator_name AS uploader_name FROM t_bid_attachment a INNER JOIN t_file f ON f.file_id = a.file_id WHERE a.business_type = #{businessType} AND a.business_id = #{businessId} AND a.deleted_flag = 0 ORDER BY a.is_main DESC, a.file_category ASC, a.sort_no ASC, a.attachment_id ASC

SELECT a.attachment_id, a.business_type, a.business_id, a.file_id, f.file_name, f.file_size, f.file_key, a.file_category, a.version_no, a.is_main AS main_flag, f.create_time AS upload_time, f.creator_name AS uploader_name FROM t_bid_attachment a INNER JOIN t_file f ON f.file_id = a.file_id WHERE a.business_type = #{businessType} AND a.business_id = #{businessId} AND a.attachment_id = #{attachmentId} AND a.deleted_flag = 0 LIMIT 1
